mapper.insert: INSERT INTO freeboard_comment ( commentid, boardid, userid, username, content, parentid, createdat ) VALUES ( seq_freeboard_comment_id.nextval, #{boardId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{parentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT c.commentid AS commentId, c.boardid AS boardId, c.userid AS userId, c.username AS userName, u.type AS userType, c.content, c.parentid AS parentId, c.createdat AS createdAt, c.updatedat AS updatedAt FROM freeboard_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = c.userid WHERE c.boardid = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.createdat ASC

SELECT commentid AS commentId, boardid AS boardId, userid AS userId, username AS userName, content, parentid AS parentId, createdat AS createdAt, updatedat AS updatedAt FROM freeboard_comment WHERE commentid = #{commentId}
